extortion.description: Vitalmex is a Mexican company dedicated to providing personalized health solutions, along with medical logistics and technical services for medical equipment and instruments. Their mission is to improve patients' quality of life through differentiated and cost-effective solutions. They aim to establish world-class leadership that revolutionizes health systems while emphasizing values such as integrity, humanity, and collaboration. Vitalmex focuses on customer orientation and innovative problem-solving to enhance satisfaction and meet applicable product and service requirements.
